steps.assistant_text: Split 3-insn bundled leaf off 0x267C. 0x267C is a 3-call chain: field_14 = a1, r1 = gl_func(7), field_10 = gl_func(ref, field_14), return gl_func(r1). 0x26CC is the split leaf: *a0->field_14 = a1; *a0->field_10 = 0.
